<script>
var TKOLIB = TKOLIB || {};
TKOLIB.pianoInit = function(){
  TKOLIB._pianoInitDone = true;
  document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
    // login
    const loginBtn = e.target.closest('.piano-login');
    if (loginBtn) {
      if (loginBtn.dataset.returnTo) window.MWLIB.setReturnToPath(loginBtn.dataset.returnTo);
      if (tp.pianoId.isUserValid() && loginBtn.dataset.returnTo) {
        location.href = window.MWLIB.getReturnToPath();
        return;
      }
      e.preventDefault();
      tp.pianoId.show({
        screen: 'login',
        formName: 'tkid_tol',
        stage: 'tol',
        onSuccess: function() {
          const returnTo = window.MWLIB.getReturnToPath();
          if (returnTo) location.href = returnTo;
        }
      });
      return;
    }
    // regist
    const registBtn = e.target.closest('.piano-regist');
    if (registBtn) {
      if (registBtn.dataset.returnTo) window.MWLIB.setReturnToPath(registBtn.dataset.returnTo);
      if (tp.pianoId.isUserValid() && registBtn.dataset.returnTo) {
        location.href = window.MWLIB.getReturnToPath();
        return;
      }
      e.preventDefault();
      tp.pianoId.show({ screen: 'register', formName: 'tkid_tol', stage: 'tol' });
      return;
    }
    // logout
    const logoutBtn = e.target.closest('.piano-logout');
    if (logoutBtn) {
      if (logoutBtn.dataset.returnTo) window.MWLIB.setReturnToPath(logoutBtn.dataset.returnTo);
      e.preventDefault();
      tp.pianoId.logout();
      window.MWLIB.logout();
      return;
    }
  });
};
tp = window["tp"] || [];
tp.push(["init", function() {
  TKOLIB.pianoInit();
}]);
</script>
<script>
// Piano 初期化前でもボタンを動作させるフォールバック
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  if (window.TKOLIB && TKOLIB._pianoInitDone) return;

  // logout
  var logoutBtn = e.target.closest('.piano-logout');
  if (logoutBtn) {
    e.preventDefault();
    if (window.tp && tp.pianoId && typeof tp.pianoId.logout === 'function') {
      tp.pianoId.logout();
    } else {
      window.MWLIB.logout();
    }
    return;
  }

  // login / regist
  var loginBtn = e.target.closest('.piano-login');
  var registBtn = !loginBtn && e.target.closest('.piano-regist');
  var btn = loginBtn || registBtn;
  if (!btn) return;
  e.preventDefault();
  if (btn.dataset.returnTo) window.MWLIB.setReturnToPath(btn.dataset.returnTo);
  // SDK ロード完了を待ってからダイアログ表示
  var wait = setInterval(function() {
    // pianoInit が完了していたらそちらのハンドラに任せる
    if (window.TKOLIB && TKOLIB._pianoInitDone) {
      clearInterval(wait);
      return;
    }
    if (window.tp && tp.pianoId && typeof tp.pianoId.show === 'function') {
      clearInterval(wait);
      if (tp.pianoId.isUserValid() && btn.dataset.returnTo) {
        location.href = window.MWLIB.getReturnToPath();
      } else {
        tp.pianoId.show({
          screen: loginBtn ? 'login' : 'register',
          formName: 'tkid_tol',
          stage: 'tol',
          onSuccess: function() {
            var returnTo = window.MWLIB.getReturnToPath();
            if (returnTo) location.href = returnTo;
          }
        });
      }
    }
  }, 200);
});
</script>
<!-- Piano Script End -->

<script>
function makeExpires(hours = 1) {
  const d = new Date();
  d.setTime(d.getTime() + hours * 60 * 60 * 1000);
  return d.toGMTString();
}
function setIdrefCookie(value) {
  document.cookie = 'idref=' + value + '; Expires=' + makeExpires() + '; path=/; Domain=toyokeizai.net; SameSite=none; Secure';
}
function articleId(el) {
  return el.dataset.articleId || location.pathname.split('/').at(-1);
}
function formId() {
  return new URLSearchParams(location.search).get('code');
}
function resolveFollowCookie(el) {
  if (el.dataset.profileId) return 'tolfm-a' + el.dataset.profileId;
  if (el.dataset.featureId)   return 'tolfm-f' + el.dataset.featureId;
  if (el.dataset.tagObjectId) return 'tolfm-k' + el.dataset.tagObjectId;
  if (el.dataset.companyId)   return 'tolfm-c' + el.dataset.companyId;
  if (el.dataset.industryId)  return 'tolfm-i' + el.dataset.industryId;
  return null;
}
const delegationMap = [];
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  for (const { selector, getValue, excludeSelector } of delegationMap) {
    const el = e.target.closest(selector);
    if (!el) continue;
    if (excludeSelector && el.matches(excludeSelector)) continue;
    const value = getValue(el);
    if (value) setIdrefCookie(value);
  }
});
function onClickSetCookie(selector, getValue, initClass = null, excludeSelector = null) {
  document.querySelectorAll(selector).forEach(function(el) {
    if (excludeSelector && el.matches(excludeSelector)) return;
    if (initClass) {
      if (el.classList.contains(initClass)) return;
      el.classList.add(initClass);
    }
    el.addEventListener('click', function() {
      const value = getValue(this);
      if (value) setIdrefCookie(value);
    });
  });
  delegationMap.push({ selector, getValue, initClass, excludeSelector });
}
onClickSetCookie('.piano_tkm_signup_paid, .piano-login, .piano-regist', () => 'tol', 'js-tol-init', '.piano_position_tip, .piano-login.lead-member, .piano-regist.lead-member');
onClickSetCookie('.js-follow', resolveFollowCookie, 'js-follow-init');
onClickSetCookie('.js-bookmark', (el) => 'tolbm-' + articleId(el), 'js-bookmark-init');
onClickSetCookie('.piano-login.lead-member, .piano-regist.lead-member', () => {
  const id = formId();
  return id ? 'tolmw-' + id : null;
}, 'js-tolmw-init');
onClickSetCookie('.js-tab-edit-toggle', () => 'toltab', 'js-tab-init');
</script>
